author: y4rr
content: Decision: For Swin logit parity, use tiny SwinTransformer config (embed_dim=16, depths=[1,1], 2 stages, 32x32 input, num_classes=4). Rationale: Full swin_tiny has ~29M params, too large for JSON fixtures. The tiny variant exercises: patch_embed, SwinBlock (LayerNorm+MHA+MLP), downsample Conv2d, global avg pool, head Linear. Same operators, just smaller scale. Approach matches ferrotorch-llama's tiny-config fixture pattern.
